modules.block_1783451967687:
param amp = 0.2
param dist = 1
static dist_ = 1

OUT[0] <- amp*tanh(dist_*IN[0])

dist_ = dist_ + 0.00001*(dist - dist_)

modules.block_1783517161006:
param amp = 0.2
param atk = 0.01
param rel = 0.5

static block_1783517161006_gate_ = 0
static block_1783517161006_env = 0
static block_1783517161006_denv = 1/(atk*SAMPLE_RATE)

block_1783517161006_env2 = block_1783517161006_env*block_1783517161006_env
OUT[0] <- amp*block_1783517161006_env2*block_1783517161006_env2

block_1783517161006_env = min 1 (max 0 (block_1783517161006_env + block_1783517161006_denv))
block_1783517161006_env >= 1 ? block_1783517161006_denv = -1/(rel*SAMPLE_RATE) : (block_1783517161006_env <= 0 ? block_1783517161006_denv = 0)
